title: T4032YT Payroll Deductions Tables - Yukon - Effective January 1, 2026 - Canada.ca
content:
## T4032YT Payroll Deductions Tables - CPP, EI, and income tax deductions - Yukon - Effective January 1, 2026

## Notice to the reader
Publication T4032, Payroll Deductions Tables , is available in sections for each province and territory. Section A (available in both HTML and PDF formats) contains general information. Sections B to E (available in PDF format only) contain the payroll deductions tables for Canada Pension Plan contributions, Employment Insurance premiums, and federal and Yukon territorial tax deductions.
Please note that you can also use the Payroll Deductions Online Calculator (PDOC) to quickly calculate federal and provincial payroll deductions.
- t4032yt-january-general-information.html [HTML]
- t4032-yt-1-26e.pdf [PDF]

### Section B(i) – CPP contributions tables
- 52 pay periods a year (Weekly) [PDF]
- 26 pay periods a year (Biweekly) [PDF]
- 24 pay periods a year (Semi-monthly) [PDF]
- 12 pay periods a year (Monthly) [PDF]

### Section B(ii) – Second additional CPP contributions table
- When the province or territory of employment is other than the province of Quebec [PDF]

### Section C - Employment Insurance premiums tables
- When the province or territory of employment is other than the province of Quebec [PDF]

### Sections D and E - Federal and Yukon territorial tax deductions tables
- 52 pay periods a year (Weekly) [PDF]
- 26 pay periods a year (Biweekly) [PDF]
- 24 pay periods a year (Semi-monthly) [PDF]
- 12 pay periods a year (Monthly) [PDF]
Last update: 2025-12-17
Related document: T4032 Payroll Deductions Tables
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.
